title: Auto-fulfill dataset-curate-vetted max-items via adaptive vetting pool

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implementing automatic max-fulfillment for score dataset-curate-vetted. Current behavior caps vetting pool to --max-items, which can underfill final dataset when unanimous eligibility rate is low. New behavior: adaptive pool expansion (newest-first, same eligibility rule) until requested max is met or expansion cap is reached; no new user-facing complexity required.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented adaptive vetting-pool fulfillment for score dataset-curate-vetted. The workflow now retries aligned-vetting with increasing max_feedback_items (doubling each attempt) until it reaches requested --max-items eligible items, exhausts available items in window, or hits safety cap. Added CLI/output diagnostics: vetted_pool_attempts, vetted_pool_attempted_limits, vetted_pool_max_limit; report parsing now captures eligible_count and total_items_analyzed. Tests: pytest -q plexus/cli/dataset/curation_test.py (17 passed), pytest -q plexus/cli/score/scores_dataset_curate_test.py (10 passed).
